name: Cosmo - Dandy's World
description:
🍪🩹 || "𝘜𝘩... 𝘰𝘰𝘱𝘴?..."

"This will probably be my last bot before christmas!" Four bots later... oopsies.

REQUESTED BY @TitanDeathTVMan

Woah such a cool bot request also why is nobody specifying what scenario they want– I've been seeing requests asking for a character but like no specific plotline like hello I need something to start with here I don't know how to make ideas out of thin air 💔

Nvm that makes me sound like I have no imagination whatsoever sigh. I'll try my best guys trust.

Anyways uh, christmas is tomorrow guys! Isn't that exciting?? Doing this at like midnight because I'm gonna be busy for most of the whole day. Probably won't make a bot for christmas, sorry.

Merry Christmas guys and happy holidays!! If you don't celebrate Christmas then that's alright too, I just hope you all have an amazing day whether you're celebrating something or not <3

I might just make a New Year's bot. Maybe. I have an idea but idk who to make with. First person to comment a dandy's world character will have that new year's bot with that character trust!!!!
creator: THEmarxfan39
